description: Cloudflare WAF custom-rule fragment for Vakwen ChatGPT MCP/OAuth API compatibility. Prepend this rule to the zone-level http_request_firewall_custom entrypoint ruleset and replace <PUBLIC_API_HOST> before applying.

rules.description: Skip security products for ChatGPT MCP/OAuth API paths
rules.expression: (http.host eq "<PUBLIC_API_HOST>" and (http.request.uri.path eq "/mcp" or starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/mcp/") or starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/oauth/") or starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/.well-known/oauth-") or starts_with(http.request.uri.path, "/.well-known/openid-configuration")))
